flowReports.details: vLLM backend adapter tests verified: initialization with TurboQuant KV cache integration, health check returns healthy status, error handling for uninitialized backend, stub implementation when vLLM unavailable. All unit tests passed.

llama.cpp backend adapter tests verified: initialization with GGUF models, GGUF converter finds pre-converted models, health check returns status with vocab_size and context_size, error handling for uninitialized backend, stub implementation with informative error messages. All unit tests passed including real llama-cpp-python installation tests.

notes: vLLM backend tests: 33 passed, 2 skipped (real vLLM installation tests skipped because vLLM is not available on Python 3.14+)
llama.cpp backend tests: 29 passed, 0 skipped (real llama-cpp-python installation tests passed)
Both backends provide stub implementations when dependencies are unavailable
Health check implementations return structured status with backend availability
Error handling provides meaningful exceptions for all failure modes
Backend registry integration verified - both backends properly registered
